title: Compare WebSockets, SSE, long polling in 2026
meta_description: Pick the right real-time tool in 2026 — concrete latency, cost, and Safari support data behind WebSockets, SSE, and long polling for 1k concurrent users.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSocket for real-time because it's obvious.

But Safari 17 breaks it on non-standard ports.

SSE supports Safari and costs $0 on Cloudflare.

https://kubaik.github.io/compare-websockets-sse-long-polling-in-2026

#Blockchain #WebDev #WebSockets #RealTime

Which part took you the longest to get right?
